rejected_or_quarantined_evidence: <evidence the arbiter declined to admit and why>
protocol_conduct: <were the duel rules followed; any violations>
what_it_supports: <the narrow claim the result actually backs>
what_it_does_not_support: that the seed paper is wrong
that the observable fails in the paper's full model
that all fixed-order statistics fail generally
permitted_wording: In this toy model and metric choices, the tested third-order statistic did not survive after second-order collapse.
forbidden_wording: The result settles the logic cleanly.
confidence_and_limitations: <confidence level and the limits that bound it>
